_meta.failure_shape: Layer 2 / Layer 3 — frontend faked the missing-API data rather than surface a missing-API SR
_meta.originating_failure: v1.7.0 motivating case: frontend agent encountered a UI element needing a backend API that did NOT exist; rather than write a missing-api-for-frontend-element SR, the agent mocked / hardcoded / stubbed the response so the test passed
